pages.description: The game office view — a top-down grid layout with clickable furniture and agent desks

checks.expected: Page loads showing a dark 'HQ' header bar and a grid of colored tiles representing an office floor plan

checks.target: Grid with colored tiles — stone/gray for walls, amber for desks, blue for conference, white for whiteboard
checks.expected: A 20x14 grid is visible with distinct tile colors for different furniture types

checks.target: Agent initials on desk tiles: A (Alex), S (Sarah), M (Morgan), X (Marcus), P (Priya)
checks.expected: Five desk tiles show single-letter initials with colored identity dots

checks.target: Any agent desk tile (e.g., the tile with 'S' for Sarah)
checks.expected: Right side panel opens showing 'Sarah' as title, 'CTO' role, and status information

checks.target: The whiteboard tile (white tile with 'W' on the right wall)
checks.expected: Side panel shows 'Directives' header and lists any active directives from the store

checks.target: The mailbox tile (red tile with envelope icon near bottom-left)
checks.expected: Side panel shows 'Reports' header and lists recent reports or 'No reports available'

checks.target: The CEO desk tile (yellow tile with star icon, top-right area)
checks.expected: Side panel shows 'CEO Desk' with pending approvals count and active directive info

checks.target: Game header bar with 'HQ', current date, and status counts
checks.expected: Dark header shows 'HQ' on left, today's date in center, and 'X active / Y idle' counts on right

checks.target: Sidebar 'HQ' nav link with Building2 icon
checks.expected: Second item in sidebar (after Dashboard) labeled 'HQ' with a building icon, clickable
